name: John Wiley & Sons, Inc.
description: John Wiley & Sons, Inc. is a global leader in research and education, dedicated to transforming knowledge into actionable intelligence. Founded in 1807, the company provides trusted content, data-driven insights, and knowledge services that empower researchers, educators, and professionals to tackle complex challenges. With a strong focus on digital innovation, Wiley supports scientific advancement, professional development, and lifelong learning. Headquartered in Hoboken, New Jersey, the company operates internationally, leveraging over two centuries of experience to bridge the gap between information and impact, while maintaining a commitment to corporate responsibility and sustainable practices.
